name: defi-skills
description: Natural language to unsigned DeFi transactions. Translates intents into transaction payloads across 13 protocols (Aave, Lido, Uniswap, Curve, Compound, MakerDAO, Rocket Pool, EigenLayer, Balancer, Pendle, WETH, ERC-20, ERC-721). Deterministic, no signing, no private keys.
